titles.title: Monitor Accountability Act
Monitor Accountability Act of 2026
Monitor Accountability Act
To provide for conditions on the appointment of monitors by courts, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 13 - 11.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Judiciary. H. Rept. 119-635.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 551.

committee.name: House Judiciary
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To

term.name: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
